text.title: Test as Living Documentation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Test as Living Documentation end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: harvest-ac-corpus
step.action: List every AC ID + sentence in scope.
step.decision-gate: Reject if ACs lack stable IDs.

step.name: translate-ac-to-gwt
step.action: Author Given/When/Then test name per AC; one test scenario per AC.
step.decision-gate: Reject tests without AC ID in name.

step.name: wire-doc-generator
step.action: Run framework with HTML reporter; publish to docs_url.
step.decision-gate: Reject CI green without docs publish step.

step.name: compute-ac-coverage
step.action: Compute % AC with >=1 scenario; emit ac_coverage_pct.

step.name: stakeholder-quarterly-review
step.action: BA/PM reads docs; signs date; carries drift items.
step.decision-gate: Reject artefact older than 90 days without review.
